name: Shanxi Blue Flame Holding Company Limited
summary: Shanxi Blue Flame Holding Company Limited engages in the exploration, development, and utilization of coal mine gas. The company produces and sells coalbed gas, which is a kind of hydrocarbon gas that is deposited in coal seam and coal strata. Its products are used in household, industrial, and vehicle fuel, as well as chemical raw materials and other fields. The company was formerly known as Taiyuan Coal Gasification Company, Limited and changed its name to Shanxi Blue Flame Holding Company Limited in May 2017. Shanxi Blue Flame Holding Company Limited was founded in 1998 and is based in Taiyuan, China.
